Name: MAP_OBJECT_TREASURE_BOX_PARAM
Description: Defines treasure chest behavior, including trap activation rules, trap damage effects, and enemy generation settings.

Fields.Name: Force Trap Activation
Fields.Description: Forces the chest trap to activate regardless of normal conditions.

Fields.Name: Gas Trap Damage ID
Fields.Description: Damage parameter ID used for poison or toxic gas traps.

Fields.Name: Healing Gas Trap Damage ID
Fields.Description: Damage parameter ID used for healing or restorative gas effects triggered by traps.

Fields.Name: Explosion Trap Damage ID
Fields.Description: Damage parameter ID used for explosive chest traps.

Fields.Name: Arrow Barrage Trap Damage ID
Fields.Description: Damage parameter ID used for continuous arrow-firing traps.

Fields.Name: Trap Enemy Spawn
Fields.Description: Defines whether interacting with the chest spawns an enemy as a trap.
